_meta.description: Demo Console replay fixture for Google Lead Ads (ticket E-3). PII placeholders below get substituted at send time with the consented prospect's name and phone from the active demo_sessions row. Replace this fixture with a real captured webhook payload once ticket A-2 (Twilio subaccount) is provisioned and you've run one real Google Lead Form submission through the prod intake.

payload.problem_description: Boiler not heating water. Google Ads form submission.
